summary: Completed testing of Field Mission System (Daily Community Challenge) for Philos Orientation. All backend tests (11/11) pass. All frontend components render correctly with proper Hebrew RTL layout and mission_contributed message appears correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: GET /api/orientation/mission-today returns all required fields: direction, mission_he, description_he, participants, target, progress_percent
GOOD: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id} returns mission_contributed boolean correctly
GOOD: Mission participants increment correctly when user direction matches mission direction (recovery == recovery)
GOOD: FieldMissionSection renders correctly on Home tab with data-testid='field-mission-section'
GOOD: Section positioned correctly between DailyOrientationQuestion and RelativeScoreSection
GOOD: All 6 data-testid attributes present: mission-title, mission-description, mission-progress-bar, mission-participants, mission-target, mission-contributed
GOOD: 'הפעולה שלך תרמה למשימת היום' message appears after completing daily question when direction matches
GOOD: Participants count updates in real-time after contribution (4 → 5 in test)
GOOD: Mission direction rotation based on day-of-year working (today = recovery)
test_credentials: Anonymous user - no auth required. Fresh user ID generated for each test to avoid 'already answered today' state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field Mission System tested: (1) GET /api/orientation/mission-today returns direction, mission_he, description_he, participants, target, progress_percent, (2) POST /api/orientation/daily-answer includes mission_contributed boolean, (3) Participants increment when user direction matches mission direction, (4) FieldMissionSection on Home tab shows mission title, description, progress bar, participants, target, (5) 'הפעולה שלך תרמה למשימת היום' message appears when direction matches. Today's mission direction is 'recovery'.

backend_tests.TestMissionToday::test_mission_today_ret: PASS - 'קח רגע של מנוחה והטענה עצמית היום'
